AddRowV2.displayName: Add a row into a table
AddRowV2.description: Add a new row into the Excel table.

CreateIdColumn.displayName: Add a key column to a table
CreateIdColumn.description: Add a key column to an Excel table. The new column will be appended to the right.

CreateTable.description: Create a new table in the Excel workbook.

CreateWorksheet.description: Create a new worksheet in the Excel workbook.

DeleteItem.description: Delete a row using a key column.

GetAllWorksheets.description: Get a list of worksheets in the Excel workbook.

GetComment.displayName: Get a comment present in a workbook
GetComment.description: Get a comment present in a workbook.

GetComments.displayName: List all comments present in a workbook
GetComments.description: List all comments present in a workbook.

GetItem.description: Get a row using a key column.

GetItems.displayName: List rows present in a table
GetItems.description: List rows present in a table.

GetTables.description: Get a list of tables in the Excel workbook.

PatchItem.description: Update a row using a key column. The input value will overwrite the specified cells and columns left blank will not be updated. In order to append (instead of overwrite) a value, use the "Get a row" action to retrieve the content first.

ReplyComment.displayName: Reply to a comment present in a workbook
ReplyComment.description: Reply to a comment present in a workbook.

RunScriptProd.description: Runs an Office Script against an Excel workbook. Use this action when the script is saved in the default location.

RunScriptProdV2.description: Runs an Office Script against an Excel workbook. Use this action when the script is saved outside of the default location.
